title: Moist Kenyan Morbier Stew
description: A velvety Kenyan-inspired stew featuring brine-dry morbier, sweet potatoes, pumpkin, and aromatic spices. Simmered in a donabe, it captures a monsoon season vibe.
instructions: Heat the donabe over medium heat and add the coconut oil until melted.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in the cubed sweet potato and pumpkin, cooking for 5 minutes to soften slightly.
Sprinkle the smoked paprika and salt, stirring to coat the vegetables evenly.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer, and cover the donabe.
Allow the stew to simmer for 20 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Lower the heat and add the sliced morbier cheese, letting it melt into the stew.
Finish with a splash of lemon juice and chopped cilantro, stirring to combine, then serve hot.
